type_error_policy: Pycairo verifies that its Python .pyi namespace covers runtime names. MoonBit generates package interfaces from checked source, and the mandatory API inventory gate compares those interfaces with every portable pycairo top-level entry, ordinary method, protocol/constructor, class attribute, constant, and enum alias.

test_typing.adaptation: The mandatory API inventory gate replaces Python stub execution: it parses cairo/__init__.pyi or a pinned schema-v2 snapshot and requires each portable public entry, method, protocol/constructor, and class attribute to map to its owning generated MoonBit interface or an explicit product decision.
